lineage: Led by Ember Seoni & August Domanchuk. Operated by Outlier.Systems.
binding_constraint_next: STILL PARKED (structural, Meadows #5, needs August + Ember — NOT self-applicable): harden the §3.1(b) bootstrap accept-rule at small N. Phase-4 N=5 evidence brief on their desk (results/jury-n5-2026-06-12/EVIDENCE-BRIEF.md: base rule 51/51 ACCEPT even at N=5; fork-1 identical-labels fired 4/51 on MID; fork-3 never fired; evidence-backed option = fork1 + N=5, not a ruling). Also PENDING: Ember countersign on the SenseRun #5 accept-rule ratification (trust-delegated by August). NEW ON THEIR DESK (SenseRun #10): the semantic variable-aliasing fork (BACKLOG #12) — whether to map a model's variable names onto oracle-canonical names; measurement-validity / arguably structural; NOT self-applied (would leak the oracle / inflate scores); needs first-live-CLD mismatch data to choose. DOMINANT ADDITIVE next lever (re-sense first): with SF+CLD+DYN all three executable judge-independent paths now ALSO runnable END-TO-END against a model (harness layer added SenseRun #10: engine/harness.py + items/harness_prompts.json), the top additive lever returns to BACKLOG #4 — seed the next format that opens a (largely) deterministic path: ARC (archetype recognition; reference-label match auto + jury for the escape), adding Dimension D's archetype sub-criterion (D3). Alternative if a live run is imminent: the first live CLD/DYN run is now UNBLOCKED by the harness and would yield the first real score distribution (feeds scorer-constant calibration #10/#11, parser-hardening #13, and the aliasing fork #12). Lean ARC for breadth unless a live run is imminent. BRIEF stays blocked behind the uncalibrated gate.

scoring_paths.deterministic: THREE executable judge-independent paths live, ALL now runnable END-TO-END against a model via the harness layer (SenseRun #10: engine/harness.py + items/harness_prompts.json — `template` elicits the canonical schema, `parse` turns a raw fenced/prose-wrapped reply into the resp.json the scorers consume, FAIL-CLOSED `PARSE_ERROR — not scored` on unparseable/malformed input; selftest 61/61; reuses the scorers' own normalization, does not re-implement semantics). SF (5 items, L1-L3) numeric/qualitative-shape oracle, no jury. CLD (5 items, L3) structural sub-score AUTO-GRADED (engine/cld-score.py + items/cld_oracle.json; loop sign = product of signed edges; self-test 31/31, loop signs 11/11 by code). DYN (5 items, L3) trajectory sub-score AUTO-GRADED as of SenseRun #9 (engine/dyn-score.py + items/dyn_oracle.json: behavior mode + features {overshoot,oscillation,delay_dominant,eventual_direction} matched against 5 reference trajectories; base=0.40 mode+0.25 eventual+0.15 overshoot+0.10 oscillation+0.10 delay; partial 0.5 for right-endpoint-wrong-mode; trap cap 0.25 for the FULL named trap trajectory (mode AND endpoint). Fail-closed self-test 34/34 (mode<->feature consistency 13/13 by code; 5 refs round-trip to 1.0). FIRST auto-graded surface for Dimension D (Dynamic Prediction, w=0.18); THIRD executable judge-independent path, end-to-end.
scoring_paths.jury_open: LEV/BRIEF/open-CLD/open-DYN — SPECIFIED & GATED (§5.1) with a RUNNABLE accept-rule (§3.1, v0.2). LEV-ORG-001 CALIBRATED-provisional (synthetic raters) -> UNCERTIFIED until real human labels. CLD completeness/quality and DYN mechanism/quality sub-scores = UNCALIBRATED - not scored (no CLD/DYN gold; the scorers emit no jury number; jury.sh deliberately not run, fail-closed).

gold_set.CLD: 0/30 (5 L3 items live on the deterministic structural path; no gold-labeled quality-spread yet)
gold_set.DYN: 0/30 (5 L3 items live on the deterministic trajectory path; no gold-labeled mechanism-spread yet)

run_history.lever: seeded SF deterministic items (first jury-independent score)
calibration gold-set protocol + §5.1 fail-closed gate (defensible jury scoring, Meadows #5)
bootstrap gold-set pipeline RUN once on LEV-ORG-001; proved per-item alpha accept-rule broken at small N before it cost human labels (Meadows #6/#8); flagged structural fix to August+Ember

RESOLVED the accept-rule (Meadows #5): §3.1 bootstrap dual-rule (unanimity + percent-floor) + §3.2 set-level alpha + §4.0 quality-spread. Ratified by August (trust-delegated), Ember pending countersign

ran the new gate end-to-end: authored LEV-ORG-001 mid+trap exemplars -> CALIBRATED-provisional, clean spread 0.94/0.44/0.03; codified THE SENSERUN RITUAL into the Engine doc. Found+held-open the N=3 floor weakness (next structural fork)

COVERAGE (additive, self-approved): seeded CLD 0->5 L3 across 5 domains with deterministic structural oracle (second judge-independent path); jury portion UNCALIBRATED (fail-closed). Unblocks BACKLOG #2 (programmatic CLD scorer). §3.1(b) hardening left PARKED with August+Ember.

GRADEABILITY (additive, self-approved): built BACKLOG #2 programmatic CLD scorer (engine/cld-score.py + items/cld_oracle.json) — Meadows #6, makes CLD's deterministic structural path machine-executable end-to-end (second EXECUTABLE judge-independent path). Implements the already-governed §3.1/§4.6 method; loop sign = product of signed edges. Fail-closed self-test 31/31 (loop signs 11/11 by code). CLD jury still UNCALIBRATED. §3.1(b) Meadows-#5 hardening NOT touched (parked with August+Ember).

COVERAGE + 3rd executable path (additive, self-approved): seeded DYN 0->5 L3 across 5 domains (5 distinct fundamental behavior modes) + built the trajectory-match scorer (engine/dyn-score.py + items/dyn_oracle.json) — Meadows #6, FIRST auto-graded surface for Dimension D; THIRD executable judge-independent path. Implements the already-governed §3.1/§4.6 'reference trajectory match' method; trap caps the FULL naive trajectory (mode AND endpoint). Fail-closed self-test 34/34 (mode<->feature 13/13 by code). DYN jury UNCALIBRATED. §3.1(b) Meadows-#5 hardening NOT touched (parked with August + Ember).

HARNESS / GRADEABILITY end-to-end (additive, self-approved): built BACKLOG #5 — the per-format response-parsing + prompt-template bridge (engine/harness.py: template/parse/selftest + items/harness_prompts.json) for CLD + DYN. Meadows #6 information-flow: turns a raw fenced/prose-wrapped model reply into the structured resp.json the deterministic scorers consume and elicits the canonical schema, making the CLD+DYN auto-graded lanes runnable END-TO-END against a model. Construct-neutral (no item/oracle/weight/invariant change); REUSES the scorers' existing normalization rather than re-implementing semantics; FAIL-CLOSED parser (PARSE_ERROR — not scored, never a silent 0). Self-test 61/61; existing scorers unchanged (CLD 31/31, DYN 34/34). Commit a23a343. Held-open fork: semantic variable aliasing (BACKLOG #12) routed to August + Ember — NOT self-applied. §3.1(b) Meadows-#5 hardening NOT touched.
